channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-18211] lustre-initialization full-dkms failure: mkfs.lustre FATAL: unhandled/unloaded fs type 1 'ldiskfs'
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/54f68976-a222-429a-9ebc-0cabb67d1ec7

lustre-initialization failed on 100% of the full-dkms runs with the following error:

2024-09-05T13:31:27 CMD: trevis-96vm6 mkfs.lustre --mgs --fsname=lustre --mdt --index=0 --param=sys.timeout=20 --param=mdt.identity_upcall=/usr/sbin/l_getidentity --backfstype=ldiskfs --device-size=2097152 --mkfsoptions=\"-O ea_inode,large_dir\" --reformat /dev/vg_Role_MDS/mdt1
2024-09-05T13:31:27 trevis-96vm6: 
2024-09-05T13:31:27 trevis-96vm6: mkfs.lustre FATAL: unhandled/unloaded fs type 1 'ldiskfs'
2024-09-05T13:31:27 trevis-96vm6: 
2024-09-05T13:31:27 trevis-96vm6: mkfs.lustre FATAL: unable to prepare backend (22)
2024-09-05T13:31:27 trevis-96vm6: mkfs.lustre: exiting with 22 (Invalid argument)

Test session details:
clients: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-b_es6_0/701 - 6.8.0-35-generic
servers: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-b_es6_0/701 - 4.18.0-553.16.1.el8_lustre.ddn17.x86_64

It isn't clear to me if this is an installation problem (mount_osd_ldiskfs.so installed in wrong location, or lustre-osd-ldiskfs-mount RPM not installed), or a packaging problem for the server DKMS package (mount_osd_ldiskfs.so library not packaged at all?).

VVVVVVV DO NOT REMOVE LINES BELOW, Added by Maloo for auto-association VVVVVVV
lustre-initialization lustre-initialization - "lustre-initialization timed out"
item.summary: lustre-initialization full-dkms failure: mkfs.lustre FATAL: unhandled/unloaded fs type 1 'ldiskfs'

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment:
"Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>" merged in patch https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/57934/
Subject: LU-18211 build: add e2fsprogs-devel to dkms dependency
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set:
Commit: 5d37a234db7269957ae40ba599452b220b3f8106

"Jian Yu <yujian@whamcloud.com>" uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/57934
Subject: LU-18211 build: add e2fsprogs-devel to dkms dependency
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: f165fcb4eb56f4dc983e9788e8b2ea5290873e40

Looking at the node-provisioning logs, it appears that the DKMS build does not include e2fsprogs-devel:

Package e2fsprogs-1.47.1-wc1.el8.x86_64 is already installed.
Dependencies resolved.
================================================================================
 Package              Arch       Version             Repository            Size
================================================================================
Upgrading:
 e2fsprogs            x86_64     1.47.1-wc2.el8      lustre-e2fsprogs     1.1 M
 e2fsprogs-libs       x86_64     1.47.1-wc2.el8      lustre-e2fsprogs     262 k
 libcom_err           x86_64     1.47.1-wc2.el8      lustre-e2fsprogs      47 k
 libcom_err-devel     x86_64     1.47.1-wc2.el8      lustre-e2fsprogs      37 k
 libss                x86_64     1.47.1-wc2.el8      lustre-e2fsprogs      52 k

so the lustre-osd-ldiskfs-mount RPM is not built, and only lustre-osd-zfs-mount is built in this case:

Installed:
  dkms-3.1.4-3.el8.noarch                                                       
  kmod-lustre-2.14.0_ddn189-1.el8.x86_64                                        
  kmod-lustre-tests-2.14.0_ddn189-1.el8.x86_64                                  
  libblkid-devel-2.32.1-46.el8.x86_64                                           
  libmount-devel-2.32.1-46.el8.x86_64                                           
  libnvpair3-2.1.2-1.el8.x86_64                                                 
  libuuid-devel-2.32.1-46.el8.x86_64                                            
  libuutil3-2.1.2-1.el8.x86_64                                                  
  libzfs5-2.1.2-1.el8.x86_64                                                    
  libzpool5-2.1.2-1.el8.x86_64                                                  
  lustre-2.14.0_ddn189-1.el8.x86_64                                             
  lustre-all-dkms-2.14.0_ddn189-1.el8.noarch                                    
  lustre-devel-2.14.0_ddn189-1.el8.x86_64                                       
  lustre-iokit-2.14.0_ddn189-1.el8.x86_64                                       
  lustre-osd-zfs-mount-2.14.0_ddn189-1.el8.x86_64                               
  lustre-tests-2.14.0_ddn189-1.el8.x86_64
